name: crypto-side-screen
description: Crypto Side Screen — vertical split-screen monitor for Telegram alpha calls + social feeds
author: Crypto Side Screen

scripts.wechat:install: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const dir=process.env.WECHAT_BACKEND_DIR||'vendor/wechat-decrypt';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('[wechat] backend dir not found:',dir);console.error('Set WECHAT_BACKEND_DIR or clone backend locally.');process.exit(1);}const py=process.env.PYTHON_BIN||(process.platform==='win32'?'py':'python3');const r=cp.spawnSync(py,['-m','pip','install','-r','requirements.txt'],{cwd:dir,stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);"
scripts.wechat:start: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const dir=process.env.WECHAT_BACKEND_DIR||'vendor/wechat-decrypt';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('[wechat] backend dir not found:',dir);console.error('Set WECHAT_BACKEND_DIR or start backend in a separate repo.');process.exit(1);}const py=process.env.PYTHON_BIN||(process.platform==='win32'?'py':'python3');const r=cp.spawnSync(py,['main.py'],{cwd:dir,stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);"
